# mailgun_domain_dkim_keys (Data Source)

Retrieves DKIM keys for a Mailgun domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all DKIM keys for a domain
data "mailgun_domain_dkim_keys" "example" {
  domain = "mail.example.com"
}

# Output the DKIM keys
output "dkim_keys" {
  value = data.mailgun_domain_dkim_keys.example.keys
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to retrieve DKIM keys for.

### Read-Only

- `keys` (Attributes List) List of DKIM keys for the domain. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the DKIM key is active.
- `dns_record_name` (String) The DNS record name.
- `dns_record_type` (String) The DNS record type.
- `dns_record_valid` (String) Whether the DNS record is valid.
- `dns_record_value` (String) The DNS record value.
- `selector` (String) The DKIM selector.
- `signing_domain` (String) The domain used for signing.
